# Agentic CI/CD Copilot — Recommended Fix

Remove the invalid 'ignore = Ignore' line from the flake8 configuration to use only valid error codes.

## Commands to Apply

```bash
sed -i '/^ignore *= *Ignore/d' .flake8 || true
sed -i '/^ignore *= *Ignore/d' .flake8.bak || true
```

*Generated by [Agentic CI/CD Copilot](https://github.com/Atharv5873/Agentic-CI-CD-Copilot)*
